title: Mossel Bay FCS investigator 3rd best in South Africa
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - One of the Mossel Bay...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - One of the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences (FCS) Unit’s investigators, Warrant Officer Soretha van Zyl, was announced as the third best FCS employee (level 5-7) in the country at the SAPS National Excellence Awards in Bloemfontein on Monday, 26 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - One of the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences (FCS) Unit’s investigators, Warrant Officer Soretha van Zyl, was announced as the third best FCS employee (level 5-7) in the country at the SAPS National Excellence Awards in Bloemfontein on Monday, 26 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Van Zyl had won the award for the best FCS employee in the province at the Western Cape Excellence Awards on 17 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She had also been recognised as best FCS investigator in the province at the Western Cape’s FCS Awards in Worcester in December.","html":"She had also been recognised as best FCS investigator in the province at the Western Cape’s FCS Awards in Worcester in December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The case that earned her all these awards was the 2024 conviction of Siyabonga Kiewiet. On 3 August 2019, Kiewiet kidnapped a woman (28) and locked her in his room during the day, only to return at night and repeatedly rape and assault her.","html":"The case that earned her all these awards was the 2024 conviction of Siyabonga Kiewiet. On 3 August 2019, Kiewiet kidnapped a woman (28) and locked her in his room during the day, only to return at night and repeatedly rape and assault her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The woman was rescued several days later, on 14 August, when her co-workers traced her to Kiewiet’s location, forced open the door and freed her.","html":"The woman was rescued several days later, on 14 August, when her co-workers traced her to Kiewiet’s location, forced open the door and freed her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In 2024, Kiewiet was sentenced to nine life terms and 41 years for multiple counts of rape, assault to cause grievous bodily harm, assault common and kidnapping.","html":"In 2024, Kiewiet was sentenced to nine life terms and 41 years for multiple counts of rape, assault to cause grievous bodily harm, assault common and kidnapping."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Mossel Bay investigator is best FCS employee in province","Local FCS investigator the best"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay FCS investigator 3rd best in South Africa
